title: India Telecom Plans Output
description: Structured Indian telecom plan records from supported operators, including operator, category, plan name, price, validity, data, calls, SMS, network type, circle, benefits, OTT benefits, recharge URL, and scraped timestamp.

results.title: Telecom plan records
results.description: Clean dataset items containing public Indian prepaid plan details for Jio, Airtel, Vi, BSNL, and supported telecom sources.
